name: apa-assemble
description: Filing-assembly helpers for the Agent-Native-Patent-Artifact project. Includes a DATA-DRIVEN USPTO fee worksheet engine that reads a dated fee schedule (docs/fee-schedule.<date>.json), counts claims via the shared parser, and emits an itemized, entity-adjusted ESTIMATE to verify. Never hardcodes amounts; never asserts micro-entity status. Plain ESM, Node >=21, zero dependencies.
